page.content: In March 2025, Comcast NBCUniversal reported substantial metrics in its Media & Entertainment segment, with video on demand generating a total revenue of CNY500M and an average revenue per user (ARPU) of CNY30M, alongside 5,000,000 total subscribers and 2,000,000 new subscribers, reflecting a churn rate of 1.5% and a growth rate of 15%. For Q1 2025, the company saw 1,200,000 new subscribers, with a churn rate of 4.0%, a growth rate of 12.0%, and revenue growth of CNY60M, resulting in an ARPU of CNY500 and operating income of CNY1.0B. Q2 2025 yielded 1,500,000 new subscribers, with a churn rate of 3.5%, a growth rate of 10.0%, revenue growth of CNY75M, an ARPU of CNY525, and operating income of CNY1.2B.

lines.text: In March 2025, Comcast NBCUniversal reported substantial metrics in its Media & Entertainment segment, with video on
demand generating a total revenue of CNY500M and an average revenue per user (ARPU) of CNY30M, alongside 5,000,000
total subscribers and 2,000,000 new subscribers, reflecting a churn rate of 1.5% and a growth rate of 15%. For Q1 2025, the
company saw 1,200,000 new subscribers, with a churn rate of 4.0%, a growth rate of 12.0%, and revenue growth of CNY60M,
resulting in an ARPU of CNY500 and operating income of CNY1.0B. Q2 2025 yielded 1,500,000 new subscribers, with a
churn rate of 3.5%, a growth rate of 10.0%, revenue growth of CNY75M, an ARPU of CNY525, and operating income of
CNY1.2B.

page.content: In Q3 2025, the firm added 1,800,000 new subscribers, achieving a churn rate of 3.0%, a growth rate of 8.0%, revenue growth of CNY90M, an ARPU of CNY550, and operating income of CNY1.5B. Q4 2025 recorded 2,000,000 new subscribers, a churn rate of 2.5%, a growth rate of 5.0%, revenue growth of CNY100M, an ARPU of CNY600, and operating income of CNY2.0B, culminating in a total of 6,500,000 new subscribers, a churn rate of 10.0%, a growth rate of 35.0%, total revenue of CNY265M, an average ARPU of CNY525, and total operating income of CNY5.0B. In the gaming sector, total sales were recorded at 38M units sold, generating a revenue of 2.5B CNY, where mobile platforms sold 15M units for a revenue of 900M CNY, achieving a market share of 30% and a growth rate of 10%, digital sales amounting to 1.5B CNY and physical sales of 30M CNY.

lines.text: In Q3 2025, the firm added 1,800,000 new subscribers, achieving a churn rate of 3.0%, a growth rate of 8.0%, revenue growth
of CNY90M, an ARPU of CNY550, and operating income of CNY1.5B. Q4 2025 recorded 2,000,000 new subscribers, a churn
rate of 2.5%, a growth rate of 5.0%, revenue growth of CNY100M, an ARPU of CNY600, and operating income of CNY2.0B,
culminating in a total of 6,500,000 new subscribers, a churn rate of 10.0%, a growth rate of 35.0%, total revenue of CNY265M,
an average ARPU of CNY525, and total operating income of CNY5.0B. In the gaming sector, total sales were recorded at 38M
units sold, generating a revenue of 2.5B CNY, where mobile platforms sold 15M units for a revenue of 900M CNY, achieving a
market share of 30% and a growth rate of 10%, digital sales amounting to 1.5B CNY and physical sales of 30M CNY.

page.content: Console sales reached 10M units, yielding a revenue of 700M CNY with a market share of 25% and a growth rate of 8%, supported by digital sales of 1.4B CNY and physical sales of 20M CNY. PC sales totaled 8M units, bringing in a revenue of 600M CNY, with a market share of 20% and a growth rate of 5%, while digital sales reached 1.2B CNY and physical sales were 12M CNY. Hybrid platforms sold 5M units, generating 300M CNY in revenue, holding a market share of 10% with a growth rate of 2%, digital sales of 500M CNY, and physical sales of 8M CNY. The total revenue of 4.1B CNY was complemented by digital sales of 1.5B CNY and physical sales of 6M CNY, with an overall market share of 85%.
